corrections.note: Image appears to print ἔγγυην without circumflex; no clear actionable body correction here.

corrections.current: καὶ πρὸς ἐπὶ τούτοις πικρὰ ἀκούσῃ
corrections.correct: καὶ πρὸς ἐπὶ τούτοις πικρὰ ἀκούσει
corrections.note: Final form in image is future indicative ἀκούσει, not subjunctive ἀκούσῃ.
Accent visible on epsilon in image.
Printed siglum is conventional c.a. notation; transcript regularization may be acceptable, but image shows c.a.
Lemma/variant miscopied: apparatus reads κρισεις] κρισεις A, not εγγυη A.

corrections.current:
υδωρ κ. αρτος κ. ιματιον] υδωρ κ. αρτος κ. ιματιον
(sup ras) Aᶜ
corrections.correct: υδωρ κ. αρτος κ. ιματιον] ανου αρτος κ. υδωρ κ. ιματιον (sup ras) Aᵃ
corrections.note: Variant reading is different and A siglum is a with superscript a, not c.

corrections.current: 23 εχε] + ονειδισμον οικιας σου μη ακουσης ℵᶜᵃ
corrections.correct: 23 εχε] + ονειδισμον οικιας σου μη ακουσης ℵc.a.

corrections.note: Printed variant appears ος μεν, not οπ μες.

corrections.current: αρκειε ℵ* (παρ. κ*) | ξενιας B*Bᵇ? | οικιας Bᵇ?ℵA
corrections.correct: αρκειε ℵ* (παρ. κ*) | ξενιας B*Bᵇ? | οικιας Bᶜ?ℵA
corrections.note: Third siglum appears Bc? rather than Bb? in image.
Printed note ends with period after vid.
No clear actionable difference beyond typography.

uncertain.note: Accentuation of ἔγγυην/ἔγγυην not fully clear; likely no correction needed.
First variant reading under v.25 is hard to decipher; appears closer to ος μεν than transcript's οπ μες.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct, but 29:25 has a real form error (ἀκούσει). Apparatus contains several substantive misreadings, especially at 29:19 and 29:21. Right-margin verse references are present in image but not transcribed; acceptable since they are not part of body text.
